members.name: AddId
members.signature: public void AddId(int id, String path)
members.summary: Adds a new UID value which is mapped to the given resource path. Fails with an error if the UID already exists, so be sure to check [method has_id] beforehand, or use [method set_id] instead.

members.name: CreateId
members.summary: Generates a random resource UID which is guaranteed to be unique within the list of currently loaded UIDs. In order for this UID to be registered, you must call [method add_id] or [method set_id].

members.name: CreateIdForPath
members.summary: Like [method create_id], but the UID is seeded with the provided [param path] and project name. UIDs generated for that path will be always the same within the current project.

members.name: EnsurePath
members.summary: Returns a path, converting [param path_or_uid] if necessary. Fails and returns an empty string if an invalid UID is provided.

members.name: GetIdPath
members.summary: Returns the path that the given UID value refers to. Fails with an error if the UID does not exist, so be sure to check [method has_id] beforehand.

members.name: HasId
members.summary: Returns whether the given UID value is known to the cache.

members.name: IdToText
members.summary: Converts the given UID to a [code]uid://[/code] string value.

members.name: PathToUid
members.summary: Converts the provided resource [param path] to a UID. Returns the unchanged path if it has no associated UID.

members.name: RemoveId
members.summary: Removes a loaded UID value from the cache. Fails with an error if the UID does not exist, so be sure to check [method has_id] beforehand.

members.name: SetId
members.signature: public void SetId(int id, String path)
members.summary: Updates the resource path of an existing UID. Fails with an error if the UID does not exist, so be sure to check [method has_id] beforehand, or use [method add_id] instead.

members.name: TextToId
members.summary: Extracts the UID value from the given [code]uid://[/code] string.

members.name: UidToPath
members.summary: Converts the provided [param uid] to a path. Prints an error if the UID is invalid.

constants.name: INVALID_ID
constants.summary: The value to use for an invalid UID, for example if the resource could not be loaded. Its text representation is [code]uid://<invalid>[/code].
